channel.title: Comments on: Rohrbach Brewing, Rochester, NY
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: nancy hawkins
item.dc:creator: nancy hawkins
item.description: hi paul great sight. hope all is well with the family. we will try and see you guys when we head home in late march. love to all aunt nanci
item.content:encoded:
hi paul
great sight. hope all is well with the family. we will try and see you guys when we head home in late march. love to all
aunt nanci
